title: Bee Sting 被蜜蜂蛰了
scene: Grace在花园里被蜜蜂蛰了手，爸爸帮她处理。

lines.en: Ouch! Dad, something stung my hand!
lines.zh: 哎！爸爸，什么东西蛰了我的手！

lines.en: Let me see. Oh, it is a bee sting.
lines.zh: 让我看看。噢，是蜜蜂蛰的。

lines.en: It hurts so much! My hand is swelling up!
Do not scratch it. Let me get the stinger out.
Is there a stinger still in my hand?
Yes. Let me scrape it off with this card.
Ow! Are you sure you got it all out?
lines.zh: 哎！你确定都拔出来了吗？

lines.en: Yes. Now let me wash it and put some ice on it.
lines.zh: 确定。现在让我洗一下，放些冰块。

lines.en: The ice feels better. Will it stop hurting?
lines.zh: 冰块感觉好多了。还会疼吗？

lines.en: Yes, it will feel better soon. Next time wear gloves in the garden.
lines.zh: 会好的，很快就不疼了。下次在花园里戴手套。
